{{Infobox technique
| name = Heart of Twin Stars
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Heart of Twin Stars Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a technique manual that serves as the foundation for the [[Path of Twin Stars]]. The core concept of the technique involves dividing an individual's spiritual core into two separate parts. This dual-core structure provides a natural defense, as one core can be utilized if the other is disabled. Beyond mere protection, the technique allows a practitioner to hold and separate different types of [[madra]] within a single body. This capability enables the user to potentially learn multiple [[Paths]] simultaneously by storing distinct energies in each core. While initially viewed as a simple or even useless method, the technique's complexity allows for advanced applications, such as filtering and sorting various absorbed energies or managing different [[madra]] types during combat. The manual itself has evolved from a simple instructional guide into a personal record for documenting the development of the [[Path]]. The practice requires intense focus and careful cycling, as strong emotions can disrupt its effectiveness.}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a manual studied by [[Kelsa]] that functions as a cycling technique. This instructional book contains a specific note regarding the cancellation of [[madra]] aspects, though it is only halfway complete with many pages remaining blank. Notably, the technique described within requires no specific aspect to perform and possesses a sound similar to a classic [[Enforcer technique]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heart of Twin Stars]] is a technique that requires no specific aspect.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4">''Unsouled'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heart of Twin Stars]] is a book or manual that [[Kelsa]] studies.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c5">''Unsouled'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] manual contains a note about canceling out the aspects of madra.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6">''Unsouled'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a cycling technique.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20">''Unsouled'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Heart of Twin Stars]] is described as sounding like a classic [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] manual is only halfway complete with the rest of the pages being blank.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] was originally a technique manual.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c2">''Soulsmith'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a manual.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c4">''Soulsmith'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] changed his breathing technique according to the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] manual.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] was originally a sheaf of yellow papers that became [[Lindon]]'s personal [[Path manual]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c16">''Soulsmith'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Heart of Twin Stars]] manual.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c3">''Ghostwater'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] has no practical use in battle.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a spirit [[Enforcer technique]] capable of splitting a single core into two or separating a portion of the soul from itself. During his journey, [[Lindon]] utilizes a modified version of this technique that resides within him. This process is enhanced by [[Little Blue]], who provides empowerment to the ability. While draining power from a priest, [[Lindon]] successfully cycles the technique and eventually employs it to sort energy.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a spirit [[Enforcer technique]] designed to split one core into two.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c9">''Wintersteel'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a technique that can separate part of the soul from itself.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] is using a modified [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Little Blue]] can empower the [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] cycled the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] while draining power from the priest.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is inside [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c23">''Wintersteel'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]] uses the [[Heart of Twin Stars]] to sort energy.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is something [[Lindon]] can cycle.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c12">''Bloodline'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] is a spiritual [[Enforcer technique]] used for cycling [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] made a purified soul [[Enforcer binding]] to simulate the [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c4">''Dreadgod'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Lindon]] possesses and can cycle the power of the [[Heart of Twin Stars]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] can purify [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c23">''Dreadgod'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] divided the spiritual river drained from [[Northstrider]] into many colored streams.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Heart of Twin Stars]] allows [[Lindon]] to filter powers stolen from [[Northstrider]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The jade strip declaring its requirements said, simply, “None.”

Carefully, Lindon withdrew the book, examining the name of this technique: Heart of Twin Stars.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c4" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|Lindon remembered a line from the Heart of Twin Stars manual, a note he hadn't given much thought to: “How he cancels out the aspects of his madra, I have not yet deduced, but the result is undeniable.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|“Is that true? That’s a mind-bender for me, then, because Heart of Twin Stars sounds like a classic Enforcer technique.”<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
